channel.title: We Work Remotely: Remote Programming Jobs

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer at AlphaTech Inc
item.description:
AlphaTech Inc is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our remote-first team.

You will work with Go, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes to scale our infrastructure to millions of users.

Requirements: 5+ years backend experience, timezone flexibility preferred but not required.

Salary: $120,000 - $160,000 USD/year depending on experience.

item.title: React Frontend Developer at BetaSoft
item.description:
BetaSoft is hiring a React Frontend Developer.

Must have 3+ years of React experience and familiarity with TypeScript.

We are a distributed team across EU and APAC. Must have 4h overlap with CET (UTC+1).

Compensation: €60,000 - €80,000 per year.
